No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on advanced robotics and computer science, with no explicit or inferable connection to poverty reduction targets.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course focuses on autonomous mobile robots and their underlying technologies, with no explicit or inferable connection to health services, disease prevention, or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly aims to build 'domain knowledge and technical R&D capabilities' and 'connect with industrial applications,' directly supporting Target 4.3 (quality technical/tertiary education) and 4.4 (relevant skills for employment).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core focus on 'design, development, integration, operation, and experimentation of autonomous intelligent control technology' and 'technical R&D capabilities' for 'industrial applications' directly and strongly supports Target 9.5 on scientific research, technological upgrading, and innovation.

Life Below Water.reason: The course focuses on land-based or aerial autonomous robots, with no explicit or inferable connection to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: The course focuses on autonomous mobile robots, with no explicit or inferable connection to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course focuses on technical skills in robotics and AI, with no explicit or inferable connection to violence reduction, justice systems, or institutional development.
